features.name: pre_increment_operator_in_array_index
features.description: Code should include a pre-increment operator (++) applied to a variable used as an array index expression
features.snippet: logic [7:0] arr[8]; int i; initial arr[++i] = 1;

features.name: pre_decrement_operator_in_array_index
features.description: Code should include a pre-decrement operator (--) applied to a variable used as an array index expression
features.snippet: logic [7:0] arr[8]; int i; initial arr[--i] = 1;
